---
title: "FINALEXAM123PART2"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
```

```{r}
#Question 2
#a)
matrix <- matrix(sample(1:200, 6*12), nrow = 12, ncol = 6)
matrix
#b
colSums(matrix)
max <- 0
row <- 0
col <- 0
for (i in 1:6)
  for (j in 1:12)
    if (matrix[j,i] > max){
      max <- matrix[j,i]
      row <- j
      col <- i
    }
#c)
#highest value found:
matrix[row,col]
#this value is located at row, column
print("this is located at row")
print(row)
print("and column")
print(col)

#d)
newmatrix <- rbind(LETTERS[1:6], matrix[1,],matrix[2,],matrix[3,],matrix[4,],matrix[5,],matrix[6,],matrix[7,],matrix[8,],matrix[9,],matrix[10,],matrix[11,],matrix[12,])
newmatrix
```
